perturbation.original_text: Within seventy-five (75) days following the end of each month of a calendar year during the Term that "BCF" (as defined below) for such month, when combined with BCF for all prior months during such calendar year (other than any month which is outside the Term) is less than the Minimum BCF, Nexstar shall pay a fee to WYZZ in an amount equal to thirty-five percent (35%) of BCF for such month.
perturbation.changed_text: Within seventy-five (75) days following the end of each month of a calendar year during the Term that "BCF" (as defined below) for such month, when combined with BCF for all prior months during such calendar year (other than any month which is outside the Term) is less than the Minimum BCF, Nexstar shall pay a fee to WYZZ in an amount equal to thirty-five percent (35%) of BCF for such month. However, for the months of June and December, the payment must be made within thirty (30) days.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by specifying a different payment deadline for the months of June and December (30 days) compared to the standard deadline for all months (75 days). This contradicts with the statement that says payment should be made within seventy-five (75) days following the end of each month.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Within seventy-five (75) days following the end of each month of a calendar year during the Term that BCF for such month, when combined with BCF for all prior months of such calendar year (other than any month which is outside the Term) is greater than the Minimum BCF, Nexstar shall pay a fee to WYZZ in an amount equal to 50% of BCF for such month; provided, in the first month of each calendar year in which this sentence applies, the fee with respect to the portion of BCF for such month which, when combined with BCF for all prior months during such year (other than any month which is outside the Term) is exactly equal to the Minimum BCF, shall equal thirty-five percent (35%) of such portion rather than fifty percent (50%).
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces different payment deadlines for June and December (30 days) compared to the standard deadline for all months (75 days). The contradicted text implicitly assumes a consistent payment deadline across all months, stating 'Within seventy-five (75) days following the end of each month'. By establishing specific dates with different deadlines creates a direct contradiction, as the original text does not account for these exceptions. This aligns with the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition.

perturbation.original_text: In addition to the payment of the Section 2(a) Amount, Nexstar agrees to pay WYZZ, within 30 days following each calendar month of the Term, the amount set forth on Exhibit B hereto with respect to such calendar month
perturbation.changed_text: In addition to the payment of the Section 2(a) Amount, Nexstar agrees to pay WYZZ, within 30 days following each calendar month of the Term, the amount set forth on Exhibit B hereto with respect to such calendar month, unless otherwise agreed in writing by both parties, but no later than 45 days.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation creates a contradiction by allowing for payment deadlines to be extended to 45 days if agreed upon in writing, while simultaneously stating payments should be made within 30 days. This introduces uncertainty about the actual payment terms. It is creating contradiction in section 2(b).
perturbation.contradicted_text: (b) In addition to the payment of the Section 2(a) Amount, Nexstar agrees to pay WYZZ, within 30 days following each calendar month of the Term, the amount set forth on Exhibit B hereto with respect to such calendar month (c) On or before the 5th day of each calendar month during the Term, Nexstar shall pay to WYZZ the fair market value rent (as set forth on Exhibit C hereto) of any real property owned by WYZZ (or any affiliate thereof) and used by the Stations; provided, no rent shall be due to WYZZ, Nexstar or any affiliate thereof with respect to any period where the Stations are using corresponding real property owned by Nexstar (or any affiliate thereof).
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a contradiction by allowing payment deadlines to be extended to 45 days with written agreement, while the original text and the contradicted text (b) state that payments should be made within 30 days. This creates a direct conflict regarding the payment terms, creating uncertainty about the actual payment deadlines and therefore leading to an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Each Party shall make a payment to the other with respect to certain mutually agreed upon expenses and capital expenditures incurred (or to be incurred) as a result of the relationship created by this Agreement, such payments to be made promptly following the incurrence of any expenses and/or expenditures.
perturbation.changed_text: Each Party shall make a payment to the other with respect to certain mutually agreed upon expenses and capital expenditures incurred (or to be incurred) as a result of the relationship created by this Agreement, such payments to be made within 15 days following the incurrence of any expenses and/or expenditures, unless the expense is over $10,000, in which case payment must be made within 60 days of the incurred expense.
perturbation.explanation: The change adds complexity and a potential contradiction regarding payment terms. The original text states payment should be made promptly, but the edited version stipulates 15 days for smaller expenses and 60 days for expenses exceeding $10,000. This now creates uncertainty about what constitutes a 'prompt' payment in the original context, causing an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Each Party shall make a payment to the other with respect to certain mutually agreed upon expenses and capital expenditures incurred (or to be incurred) as a result of the relationship created by this Agreement, such payments to be made promptly following the incurrence of any expenses and/or expenditures. Such expenses and capital expenditures, which are intended to be shared equally by WYZZ and Nexstar, may include, but shall not be limited to: lease termination fees, employee severance costs, and transmitter and studio facility modifications, and equipment costs. The maximum amount of, and purpose for, such expenses are specifically set forth and identified on Exhibit D hereto.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that payments should be made 'promptly'. The changed text introduces specific timeframes (15 days and 60 days). Since the 'contradicted text' is actually the 'original text', the specific timeframes directly contradict the original understanding of 'promptly', creating an inconsistency as defined in the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' perturbation type.
